name: github_list_self_hosted_runner_groups_for_org
description: List self-hosted runner groups configured in an organization, including groups inherited from an enterprise (GET /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups). Returns total_count and runner_groups. Optional visible_to_repository filter. per_page 1-100 default 100, page, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
